metadata.description: Buildomator: a structured workflow plugin for Claude Code with planning, execution, verification, and MCP-backed project state

plugins.name: gsd
plugins.description: The same Buildomator plugin under its original /gsd: command prefix. /gsd: keeps working through the whole 4.x line and retires at v5.0 on 2026-10-01. New users should install Buildomator (the /bm: entry) instead.

plugins.name: bm
plugins.description: Buildomator: a structured workflow plugin for Claude Code. Use /bm: for planning, execution, verification, and MCP-backed project state. This is the plugin to install.
